notes: USAF; Midwest Aikido Center, Chicago. Not to be confused with Koichi Tohei (Ki Society).
USAF Western Region, San Diego; later Birankai.

name_romaji: Koichi Kashiwaya / Colin Li Pi Shan
Koichi Kashiwaya / H. Vic Montgomery / Mel Smith
Koichi Kashiwaya / H. Vic Montgomery / William Perkins

notes: Aikikai chief instructor postwar; left in 1974 to lead the Ki Society. Not Akira Tohei.
Founder of Aikido Schools of Ueshiba (ASU); direct uchi-deshi until the founder's death in 1969.
Chief instructor, New England Aikikai, Cambridge MA.

name_romaji: Phil Smith, Chris Omuro, Jeff Carlson

notes: Postwar uchi-deshi; pioneered aikido in Australia, later Belgium and New York (USAF).
Chief instructor, New York Aikikai; long-time USAF technical head.
